guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Break up long main-thread tasks / yield so inference doesn't spike INP.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — inference runs off the main thread via a Web Worker (or MediaPipe delegate); control UI stays responsive.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page navigation.

guidanceConsulted.query: responsive control panel without horizontal overflow
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Fluid layout; avoid fixed widths that overflow narrow viewports.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: verify — responsive-desktop/mobile conformance assertions checked (see rubric).

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Minimise data + keep capture on-device; be explicit that audio is processed locally and not sent anywhere.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — MicRecorder uses getUserMedia locally; audio decoded to 16kHz mono in-page and classified in a Web Worker; nothing uploaded (stated in at-a-glance Privacy row).

guidanceConsulted.query: accessible loading progress status live region
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Announce state in an accessible live region; label every control; meter semantics on score bars; keyboard operability.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — role=status aria-live lines, aria-pressed sample chips, meter role on language bars, labelled buttons.

guidanceConsulted.query: responsive control panel without horizontal overflow
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Fluid flex/grid + logical properties; wrap long content; no fixed widths that overflow mobile.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — flex-wrap sample rows, .pipe columns flex:1 1 220px with word-break, logical inline-size; responsive matrix desktop+mobile clean.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: responsive-check: desktop clean · mobile clean (no horizontal overflow)

openQuestions: Does spoken-language-id produce semantically correct audio-classification output on a real device (manual-evidenced)?
Are all controls keyboard-operable with visible focus on both classes?

followUpGoals.goal: Agent matrix pass for spoken-language-id: Read the mobile+desktop screenshots, confirm real output + tap targets + focus + dialogs, then flip support to ok (or unsupported+evidence) and enrich this critique.

summary: Revision-1 seed for spoken-language-id (audio-classification, wasm) derived from the real conformance run + responsive screenshots. Auto-checkable assertions are recorded with their true pass/fail/blocked state; manual-evidenced dimensions await an agent verdict. Not a final review.
